---
title: "Preparação de dados"
subtitle: "Aplicações com o pacote geomarkbr"
author: "Gustavo Givisiez"
date: today
lang: pt-BR

project:
  type: website
  output-dir: docs
  
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    self_contained: true
    theme: journal
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    highlight-style: tango

execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false

bibliography: references.bib
csl: planeta-zotero-abnt.csl
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup, eval = TRUE}
library(geomarkbr)
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(tmap)
tmap::tmap_mode("plot")
```

# Introdução





# Referências
